text: Regarding profitability, Apple's gross margin has remained robust at around 43.31%, as evidenced by the calculation using the gross profit and revenue figures from fiscal year 2022 (calc_id_aa10691e-fd67-4180-b25a-33f125e426f2). The operating margin has also been strong, averaging 30.29% over the period, while the net margin has been slightly lower at 25.31% (calc_id_e59ce546-00b9-4b62-a1cd-6f4e46a1851d and calc_id_43bc339e-5f84-4da9-b3d8-ce448ccb0c48).

issues.offending_span: Apple's gross margin has remained robust at around 43.31%, as evidenced by the calculation using the gross profit and revenue figures from fiscal year 2022
issues.explanation: The paragraph claims the gross margin for fiscal year 2022, but no evidence is provided for this claim. The calculations only cover fiscal year 2022.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove the reference to fiscal year 2022 or provide additional evidence for the claimed gross margin.

issues.offending_span: while the net margin has been slightly lower at 25.31%
issues.explanation: The paragraph claims a net margin of 25.31%, but no evidence is provided for this claim. The calculation only covers the net margin for fiscal year 2022.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove the reference to the net margin percentage or provide additional evidence for this claim.

issues.explanation: The paragraph discusses financial metrics without specifying the fiscal year, which could be interpreted as referring to fiscal year 2026, violating the as-of date constraint.
issues.recommended_fix: Clarify the fiscal year to avoid ambiguity.
